KATHLEEN YORIO
Maurice L. Chenier, Esq. RESNICK & LOUIS, P.C. (714) 709-4400 mchenier@rlattorneys.com; Attorney for Defendant MACY'S, INC

Counsel for Defendant did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling. Defendant;s notice of contest was received after the 4 p.m. cut-off time. Counsel for defendant seeks clarification of the Court's tentative ruling. Court allows discussion.

Hearing is held. discussed, not ARGUED. After clarification provided to parties present, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MACY'S INC. MOTION TO TRANSFER

Defendant's motion to transfer this action to San Mateo County Superior Court is denied.

[SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS]

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
